beats.text: A lifted Jeep rolls up on 35s. Amber steps out in a yellow sundress, waves cheerfully at the children. The children wave back.

beats.speaker: Amber
beats.text: DAVEY! You made it home! Your directions were SO bad, babe!
Dad's entire body becomes one long held breath. A bee lands on his arm. He doesn't flinch. He can't.

end_a.text: Doug, from across the yard, mouths the word 'what' at an octave no one can hear.

end_b.text: "A CONFERENCE," Karen repeats. "For what, David. For what conference."
